Flight + Land SFX Audition

BIT banks a flight → lands in its seat (workout-summary ceremony + onboarding gift reveal). Each candidate is a flight + its matched landing thud. ▶ pair plays the flight then drops the thud on touchdown. Pick one — its two files replace ceremony_flight.wav + ceremony_land.wav everywhere. Volume up.
